evals.prompt: Use $uxl-sycl-build-debug to diagnose a CMake configure failure after changing CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER from icpx to clang++.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the failure as configure/toolchain, asks for cache/compiler/package roots, proposes one variable changes, and separates compiler choice from runtime backend support.

evals.prompt: Use $uxl-sycl-build-debug to debug a sample that builds but cannot find a GPU at runtime.
evals.expected_output: Separates build success from runtime device discovery, asks for sycl-ls or probe output, checks drivers/runtime paths/device filters, and proposes a smoke test.

evals.prompt: Use $uxl-sycl-build-debug to troubleshoot unresolved symbols when linking a oneMath compile-time dispatch example.
evals.expected_output: Checks selected backend wrapper libraries, third-party libraries, library search paths, and runtime loader paths instead of only changing includes.
